siri_text: Tuesday's workout. Strength: Back Squat, 4 by 8 at 50 percent. Strength: Hack Squat, 3 by 10. Strength: Lateral Raise, 3 by 10. Strength: DB Bicep Curl, 3 by 10. Metcon: AMRAP 10 minutes: 6 HSPU, 5 Full Clean 60/40, 10/8 AB SPRINT. For hypertrophy, focus on back, rear delts, hamstrings.
